title: Outposts Plugin
description: Adds fully customizable outpost capture zones with loot, mobs, and strategic PvP mechanics.
body:
# 🏰 Outposts Plugin – Strategic PvP Capture Points

Bring dynamic, competitive gameplay to your Minecraft server with the **Outposts Plugin** – a powerful and fully customizable capture system designed for PvP, factions, RPG, and survival worlds. Whether you're rewarding dominance or challenging players with waves of mobs, Outposts adds strategic depth and excitement to any server setup!

---

### 🚀 Core Features

* 📍 **Dynamic Outpost Creation**
  Use WorldEdit selections to define outposts with ease – regions are automatically protected via WorldGuard.

* ⚔️ **Strategic Capture System**
  Players fight to capture outposts using configurable timers and cooldowns. Reward coordination and control!

* 🎁 **Custom Loot Tables**
  Drop anything – from vanilla items to custom **ItemsAdder** gear! Control chances, quantities, and rarity with precision.

* 👾 **Mob Wave Events**
  Spawn vanilla mobs or **MythicMobs** during key capture milestones to defend your outposts.

* 📊 **Visual Capture Progress**
  Players see real-time progress via a customizable boss bar for immersive feedback.

* 🧩 **PlaceholderAPI Integration**
  Track capture status, cooldowns, and more in scoreboards, chat, and other plugins.

* ⚙️ **Fully Configurable**
  Tweak every aspect via YAML – boss bar colors, mob spawn radius, messages, loot mechanics, and more.

* 🛠️ **Comprehensive Admin Tools**
  Powerful commands for creating, editing, testing, and managing outposts in-game.

---

### 🔌 Dependencies

**Required:**

* ✅ WorldEdit – for region selection
* ✅ WorldGuard – for outpost protection
* ✅ PlaceholderAPI – for dynamic placeholders

**Optional:**

* 🎨 ItemsAdder – support for custom item rewards
* 🐉 MythicMobs – unleash powerful mythic creatures

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NQLomPJnwmc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

### 💬 Player Commands

* `/outposts attack` – Start capturing an outpost
* `/outposts list` – View available outposts and their status

### 🛡️ Admin Commands

* `/outposts create <name> <time> <cooldown>` – Create a new outpost
* `/outposts addloot <outpost> <amount> [chance]` – Add held item to loot table
* `/outposts reload` – Reload all plugin configurations
* And many more, type `/outposts help` to see them all
* You can use `/oup` as prefix as well

> Permissions follow the format: `outposts.<action>` (e.g., `outposts.attack`, `outposts.create`)
> Use `outposts.admin` for full administrative access

---

### 🧱 Compatibility

* ✅ **Server Software**: Spigot & Paper (Paper recommended)
* ✅ **Java Version**: 21+ for 21.x or 25+ for 26.1+

---

## Support

-  on [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sD4HvQh8P4)

---

### 📦 Installation

1. Place the plugin `.jar` in your `plugins/` folder
2. Install all required dependencies
3. Restart the server
4. Configure your outposts via `config.yml` and `outposts.yml`
5. Use in-game commands to manage outposts

---

🗺️ Whether you're building a faction warzone or a PvE dungeon siege, **Outposts Plugin** empowers server admins with everything needed to create thrilling, strategic capture events!

🔗 *Check the [GITHUB](https://github.com/ggses/Outposts-README) page for full documentation and examples!*
